# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM debian:bookworm-slim

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      ca-certificates \
      curl \
      gnupg \
      iptables \
      iproute2 \
      jq \
      procps \
      tini \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings \
 && curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/debian/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg \
 && chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg \
 && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/debian bookworm stable" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list \
 && apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends docker-ce-cli docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock

RUN useradd -m -u 10001 -s /bin/bash orchestrator \
 && mkdir -p /workspace \
 && chown -R orchestrator:orchestrator /workspace

WORKDIR /workspace

VOLUME ["/var/run/docker.sock"]

COPY entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/tini","--","/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]
CMD ["bash","-lc","docker version && sleep infinity"]
